# Quality Report

## Purpose
Report quality performance, defect trends, and audit results for the reporting period.

## Audience
Quality Manager, Project Manager, QA Lead, Sponsors.

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] Quality objectives and metrics updated.
- [ ] Defect trends and coverage documented.
- [ ] Audit findings assigned owners.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Quality report supports governance decisions and corrective actions.
- Defect and audit data is traceable to source systems.
